judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on two black-and-white photographs showing a dark, blurry, disc-shaped object in the sky, but Description B adds a specific caption text not mentioned in Description A.
original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of a dark, elongated, disc-shaped object in flight over a landscape. The object is tilted, showing its underside, and appears metallic or dark against a lighter sky. The ground below is indistinct, possibly hills or trees.
black-and-white photograph of a rural landscape with a barn or small building in the middle distance. In the sky above and to the left of the building, a small, dark, disc-shaped object is visible.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned newspaper clipping collage with two small black-and-white photographs of disc-shaped objects and multiple columns of text, including the headline “I believe they are disc-type aircraft,” and subheadings “NAVY STEPS IN” and “NOT PERFECT.”*
